summary: Iteration 36: Full QA of Solomon AI Church Management System frontend after login bug fix. All 3 login flows (member/admin/platform_admin) working correctly with proper role-based redirects. All Member Portal pages (Home, Kids Check-in, Watch, Give, Groups, Events) loading with data. All Admin Dashboard pages (Dashboard, Members, Events, Groups, Communications) functional. Logout flow properly clears token and redirects to /login.

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warnings on dashboard - cosmetic, charts still render
React hydration warnings about span inside tbody/select - dev mode warning only

verified: Global fetch interceptor strips credentials:'include' correctly

pages_tested.details: Greeting, attendance streak (2 Week Streak), upcoming events, membership journey displayed
Children list with check-in buttons, pickup codes, service mode banner
Video library with sermons, categories, Watch Now buttons
Amount buttons, fund selection, payment methods (Visa, PayPal, Venmo, Zelle), YTD giving stats
Group cards with details, Request to Join buttons, member counts
Event cards, registration status, dates, capacity, Cancel/Register buttons
Stats cards (50K members, $2.8M YTD giving, 12K active), attendance/giving charts
Member list with status badges, search, export
Event list with Create Event button
12,325 groups, 40 open for joining, group cards with actions

verified: Platform Admin page shows 4 church tenants (Abundant, Cristo Viene, Potter's House, Eden X)
All Churches nav item visible in sidebar
Quick Actions available (Platform Analytics, Security Audit, System Health, Platform Settings)
Sign out clears session_token from localStorage

critical_code_review_comments: Global fetch interceptor in index.js correctly strips credentials:'include' - CORS compatible
Bearer token auto-injection working for all /api/ calls
Login speed improved from 9+ seconds to <3 seconds after fix
Watch page has separate full-width layout with its own navigation
Console warnings about chart dimensions and React hydration are cosmetic only

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 login flows, 6/6 portal pages, 5/5 admin pages)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend flows verified working in iteration 36. Critical login bug has been FIXED. Global fetch interceptor in index.js strips credentials:'include' and auto-injects Bearer tokens. When testing, ALWAYS clear service worker caches first. Console warnings about chart dimensions and React hydration spans are cosmetic dev-mode warnings only. MOCKED: Stripe payments and SMS notifications.

mocked_apis.note: All authentication, dashboard, portal endpoints use real MongoDB data
